message:
Presenton Desktop electron-v0.8.9-beta

A polished 0.8.9-beta release with lots of improvements across the Electron app.

What's New

• Faster, more reliable exports with Chromium export support
• Better image editing with stock search and OpenAI-compatible generation
• Improved AI model support, including LiteLLM, Azure, Vertex, and ComfyUI seeds
• Cleaner editing workflows, markdown rendering, and slide management
• Updated templates, Chart.js migration, and multilingual UI improvements
• Stability fixes for packaging, onboarding, layouts, fonts, and exports

Installation
Download Link: https://presenton.ai/download
Love the app? Star us on GitHub → github.com/presenton/presenton
